commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens Windows node pairing, node exec approvals, direct loopback gateway auth, device-token reuse, and related CLI/gateway regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +838, Tests +2404. Total +3242 across 47 files.

Reproducibility: unclear. as an independent current-main repro in this read-only review: the PR body and focused tests describe the Windows node pairing, direct auth, and native approval failures, but I did not run the failing current-main path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is required because this draft/protected maintainer PR changes compatibility, auth identity, protocol, and node exec-approval security boundaries rather than needing a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(cli): harden Windows node pairing and approvals
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve existing untagged device tokens for same-key metadata refresh approvals when the token was already valid before the approval
- keep rotating for scope expansion, public-key repair, stale baseline tokens, revoked/issuer-tagged tokens, incompatible role/scopes, and malformed persisted token entries
- make devices/nodes/gateway CLI RPC helpers use the direct local gateway-client admin path for explicit loopback token/password auth, avoiding stale paired CLI identity/scope traps
- make `approvals get --node` tolerate host-native Windows exec policy payloads instead of crashing on the local approvals-file shape
- harden stable Windows node identity/event routing, node approval RPC authz, and explicit loopback shared-token probing without making explicit URL+token calls depend on readable local config

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Windows node reconnect churn, stale paired CLI identity on explicit loopback gateway auth, native Windows exec approval payload parsing, node approval authorization, and shared-token/device-token auth boundaries.
Real environment tested: local targeted Vitest/oxlint on macOS, AWS Crabbox Linux gate, prior Azure Windows pond live node proof retained below; fresh Azure native Windows and WSL2 lease attempts were capacity-blocked before command execution.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/direct-loopback-gateway-auth.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/exec-approvals-validators.test.ts src/cli/devices-cli.test.ts src/cli/exec-approvals-cli.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli.coverage.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/call.test.ts src/cli/gateway-rpc.runtime.test.ts src/cli/nodes-cli/register.invoke.approval-transport-timeout.test.ts src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/node-catalog.test.ts src/gateway/node-command-policy.test.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/node-identity.test.ts src/gateway/node-registry.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts src/gateway/server.auth.compat-baseline.test.ts src/gateway/server.auth.control-ui.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-invoke-approval-bypass.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-authz.test.ts src/gateway/server.roles-allowlist-update.test.ts src/gateway/server.silent-scope-upgrade-reconnect.poc.test.ts src/infra/device-pairing.test.ts src/infra/node-pairing.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --stop-after always --label windows-node-token-88163-check --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; final rebase sanity `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts src/gateway/server.silent-scope-upgrade-reconnect.poc.test.ts && node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/call.ts src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: focused local suite passed 25 files / 542 tests; autoreview clean with no accepted/actionable findings; AWS Crabbox `provider=aws` lease `cbx_957bd262dd23` slug `violet-shrimp` run `run_da5871a7730b` passed `pnpm check:changed` in 10m21s and stopped the lease; final rebase sanity passed 3 files / 119 tests plus targeted oxlint.
Observed result after fix: explicit loopback backend token calls stay usable when the shared-token proof cannot load config, proven shared tokens omit paired device identity, CLI explicit URL+token calls continue to skip config loading, stable node events resolve through the registered node id, and changed core/coreTests lanes are green on remote AWS Crabbox.
What was not tested: fresh native Windows and WSL2 command execution after the latest push. Azure native Windows lease `brisk-shrimp` (`run_dd0dd480c3f7`) and Azure WSL2 lease `blue-lobster` (`run_c9a4e1267156`) both waited ~3 minutes without receiving a lease, so those attempts were stopped before any command ran.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ...`: 25 files / 542 tests passed
- final rebase sanity: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts src/gateway/server.silent-scope-upgrade-reconnect.poc.test.ts`: 3 files / 119 tests passed
- final rebase sanity: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/call.ts src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts`: passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox: `pnpm check:changed` passed on `cbx_957bd262dd23` / `run_da5871a7730b`
- Azure pond earlier in this PR: signed Windows prerelease launches; operator pairing approved; node role upgrade approved; Windows node registered and reported 1/1 online
- Azure pond earlier in this PR after `432c9fe`: gateway rebuilt/restarted, Windows node stayed paired/connected, `approvals get --node --json` returned host-native policy (`defaultAction=deny`, 21 rules), `system.run` allowed `echo openclaw-exec-ok`, and denied `Start-Process notepad` with `Command denied by exec policy: Block process launch`

## Notes
Still draft so Vincent can review before this becomes merge-ready. Fresh native Windows and WSL2 Crabbox proof is the remaining environment-dependent gap.
target.author: vincentkoc
